```text
129	
130	def parse_stock_lists(html: str) -> dict[str, dict]:
131	    products: dict[str, dict] = {}
132	    for row in ROW_RE.finditer(html):
133	        cells = [clean_cell(c) for c in TD_RE.findall(row.group(1))]
134	        if len(cells) < 12:
135	            continue
136	        code = cells[0].strip().upper()
137	        underlying_symbol = cells[2].strip().upper()
138	        short_name = cells[3].strip()
139	        size = cells[11].replace(",", "").strip()
140	        category = SIZE_TO_CATEGORY.get(size)
141	        if not category:
142	            continue
143	        if not re.fullmatch(r"[0-9A-Z]{2,5}", code):
144	            continue
145	        if not re.fullmatch(r"[0-9A-Z]{4,8}", underlying_symbol):
146	            continue
147	        multiplier = int(size)
148	        products[code] = {
149	            "product_code": code,
150	            "underlying_symbol": underlying_symbol,
151	            "underlying_name": cells[1].strip(),
152	            "underlying_short_name": short_name,
153	            "product_name": product_name(short_name, category),
154	            "category": category,
155	            "type_label": TYPE_LABELS.get(category, category),
156	            "contract_multiplier": multiplier,
157	            "regular_session": cells[-2] if len(cells) >= 2 else "",
158	            "after_hours_session": cells[-1] if len(cells) >= 1 else "",
159	        }
160	    return products
161	
162	
163	def parse_margining(html: str) -> dict[str, dict]:
164	    margins: dict[str, dict] = {}
165	    for row in ROW_RE.finditer(html):
166	        cells = [clean_cell(c) for c in TD_RE.findall(row.group(1))]
167	        if len(cells) < 7:
168	            continue
169	        code_raw = cells[1].strip().upper() if len(cells) > 1 else ""
170	        symbol = cells[2].strip().upper() if len(cells) > 2 else ""
171	        if not code_raw.endswith("F"):
172	            continue
173	        if not re.fullmatch(r"[0-9A-Z]{4,8}", symbol):
174	            continue
175	        code = code_raw[:-1]
176	        product = cells[3].strip() if len(cells) > 3 else ""
177	        last = cells[-1]
178	        info = {
179	            "product_code": code,
180	            "underlying_symbol": symbol,
181	            "product_name": product,
182	        }
183	        if "%" in last:
184	            info["settlement_margin_rate"] = parse_percent(cells[-3])
185	            info["maintenance_margin_rate"] = parse_percent(cells[-2])
186	            info["initial_margin_rate"] = parse_percent(cells[-1])
187	            info["margin_mode"] = "ratio"
188	        else:
189	            info["settlement_margin"] = to_int(cells[-3])
190	            info["maintenance_margin"] = to_int(cells[-2])
191	            info["initial_margin"] = to_int(cells[-1])
192	            info["margin_mode"] = "fixed"
193	        margins[code] = info
194	    return margins
195	
196	
197	def parse_index_margining(html: str) -> dict[str, dict]:
198	    margins: dict[str, dict] = {}
199	    for row in ROW_RE.finditer(html):
200	        cells = [clean_cell(c) for c in TD_RE.findall(row.group(1))]
201	        if len(cells) < 2:
202	            continue
203	        joined = " ".join(cells).upper()
204	        for code in INDEX_FUTURE_SPECS:
205	            if not re.search(rf"(^|[^A-Z]){code}([^A-Z]|$)", joined):
206	                continue
207	            nums = [to_int(cell) for cell in cells]
208	            nums = [num for num in nums if num is not None]
209	            if not nums:
210	                continue
211	            info = {
212	                "product_code": code,
213	                "initial_margin": nums[-1],
214	                "margin_mode": "fixed",
215	            }
216	            if len(nums) >= 3:
217	                info["settlement_margin"] = nums[-3]
218	                info["maintenance_margin"] = nums[-2]
219	            margins[code] = info
220	    return margins
221	
222	
223	def decode_csv_bytes(content: bytes) -> str:
224	    for enc in ("utf-8-sig", "utf-8", "big5", "cp950"):
225	        try:
226	            return content.decode(enc)
227	        except UnicodeDecodeError:
228	            continue
229	    return content.decode("big5", errors="ignore")
230	
231	
232	def normalize_header(header: str) -> str:
233	    return (
234	        header.strip()
235	        .replace("*", "")
236	        .replace(" ", "")
237	        .replace("\ufeff", "")
238	    )
239
```

```bash
cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/fin ai/族群統計網頁/site" && python -c "
import requests, re
from fetch_stock_futures_ranking import UA, TIMEOUT

url = 'https://www.taifex.com.tw/cht/3/futDailyMarketReport'
r = requests.get(url, headers={'User-Agent': UA}, timeout=TIMEOUT)
r.encoding = 'utf-8'
html = r.text
forms = re.findall(r'<form[^>]*?action=\"([^\"]*)\"[^>]*>(.*?)</form>', html, re.S)
print(f'forms with action: {len(forms)}')
for i, (action, body) in enumerate(forms):
    print(f'--- form {i}: action={action} ---')
    inputs = re.findall(r'<(input|select|textarea)[^>]*name=\"([^\"]+)\"[^>]*>', body)
    for tag, name in inputs:
        # find value/type
        m = re.search(rf'<{tag}[^>]*name=\"{re.escape(name)}\"[^>]*>', body)
        print(f'  {tag} name={name} :: {m.group()[:200] if m else \"\"}')
    print()
# 找含 queryDate / date / commodityId
print('queryDate occurrences:', len(re.findall(r'queryDate', html, re.I)))
print('commodityId occurrences:', len(re.findall(r'commodityId', html, re.I)))
print()
# 看當前頁面 HTML 是否有「目前是 X 月 X 日」之類的日期
m = re.search(r'(\d{4}/\d{2}/\d{2})', html)
print('first date in html:', m.group(1) if m else None)
" 2>&1 | head -200
```

```bash
cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/fin ai/族群統計網頁/site" && python -c "
import requests, re
from fetch_stock_futures_ranking import UA, TIMEOUT

url = 'https://www.taifex.com.tw/cht/3/futDailyMarketReport'
sess = requests.Session()
sess.headers.update({'User-Agent': UA})
sess.get(url, timeout=TIMEOUT)

# Try TX with the displayed default date
for testdate in ['2026/05/04', '2026/04/30', '2026/04/29']:
    data = {
        'queryType': '2',
        'marketCode': '0',
        'commodity_id': 'TX',
        'commodity_id2': '',
        'queryDate': testdate,
        'MarketCode': '0',
        'commodity_idt': 'TX',
        'commodity_id2t': '',
        'commodity_id2t2': '',
    }
    r = sess.post(url, data=data, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    r.encoding = 'utf-8'
    html = r.text
    no_data = '查無資料' in html
    # 抓主表
    main_table = re.search(r'<thead>.*?契約.*?未沖銷.*?</thead>(.*?)</table>', html, re.S)
    rows = []
    if main_table:
        body = main_table.group(1)
        trs = re.findall(r'<tr[^>]*>(.*?)</tr>', body, re.S)
        for tr in trs:
            cells = re.findall(r'<t[hd][^>]*>(.*?)</t[hd]>', tr, re.S)
            cells = [re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', c).strip().replace('\\n','').replace('\\t','') for c in cells]
            cells = [c for c in cells if c]
            if cells and ('TX' in cells[0] if cells else False):
                rows.append(cells)
    print(f'{testdate} TX: status={r.status_code} no_data={no_data} matched_rows={len(rows)}')
    for row in rows[:5]:
        print('   ', row)
" 2>&1 | head -50

```

```bash
cd "C:/Users/user/Desktop/fin ai/族群統計網頁/site" && python -c "
import requests, re
from fetch_stock_futures_ranking import UA, TIMEOUT

url = 'https://www.taifex.com.tw/cht/3/futDailyMarketReport'
sess = requests.Session()
sess.headers.update({'User-Agent': UA})
sess.get(url, timeout=TIMEOUT)

# Try marketCode=2 (股票期貨類) and various commodity_idt values to get bulk
trials = [
    {'marketCode': '0', 'commodity_idt': 'STO', 'commodity_id': 'STO', 'label': 'STO'},
    {'marketCode': '0', 'commodity_idt': 'STK', 'commodity_id': 'STK', 'label': 'STK'},
    {'marketCode': '2', 'commodity_idt': '', 'commodity_id': '', 'label': 'mc=2 empty'},
    {'marketCode': '2', 'commodity_idt': 'CC', 'commodity_id': 'CC', 'label': 'mc=2 CC'},
    {'marketCode': '0', 'commodity_idt': 'CC', 'commodity_id': 'CC', 'label': 'mc=0 CC'},
]
for t in trials:
    data = {
        'queryType': '2',
        'MarketCode': t['marketCode'],
        'marketCode': t['marketCode'],
        'commodity_id': t['commodity_id'],
        'commodity_id2': '',
        'queryDate': '2026/04/30',
        'commodity_idt': t['commodity_idt'],
        'commodity_id2t': '',
        'commodity_id2t2': '',
    }
    r = sess.post(url, data=data, timeout=TIMEOUT)
    r.encoding = 'utf-8'
    html = r.text
    # 計算主表內 contract rows
    main_table = re.search(r'<thead>.*?契約.*?未沖銷.*?</thead>(.*?)</table>', html, re.S)
    rows = []
    if main_table:
        body = main_table.group(1)
        trs = re.findall(r'<tr[^>]*>(.*?)</tr>', body, re.S)
        for tr in trs:
            cells = re.findall(r'<t[hd][^>]*>(.*?)</t[hd]>', tr, re.S)
            cells = [re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', c).strip() for c in cells]
            cells = [c for c in cells if c and c != '\\xa0']
            if len(cells) >= 10 and cells[0]:
                rows.append(cells[0])
    distinct_codes = set(rows)
    print(f'{t[\"label\"]:18s} status={r.status_code} contracts_in_table={len(rows)} distinct={len(distinct_codes)} sample={list(distinct_codes)[:8]}')
```
